description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building surrounded by a dense cluster of trees, both evergreen and deciduous, creating a secluded and natural setting. The main structure features a prominent front porch with steps leading up to the entrance, and a gently sloped gable roof. Adjacent to the house is a detached garage with a matching roof style, connected by a curved pathway. The property includes outdoor seating and a small arched bridge, enhancing its suburban charm. Windows are arranged symmetrically on the front facade, and the exterior is finished in a neutral, beige tone. The overall layout suggests a peaceful, private residence ideal for a suburban or semi-rural neighborhood.
description: A beige, single-story bungalow with a gable roof, front porch, detached garage, and surrounded by dense trees and outdoor features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the porch, main entrance, symmetrical windows, curved path, outdoor seating, and detached garage.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the garage, back of the house, and dense tree coverage behind the bungalow.
description_view_2: Back view with the rear wall of the bungalow mostly obscured by trees, and the garage visible to the left.
description_view_3: Side view showing the porch from an angle, the garage set back, and a clear view of the tree arrangement around the property.
